description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human figure in a dynamic running pose, with one leg extended forward and the other bent behind, as if caught mid-stride. The figure is rendered with simplified anatomical features, lacking detailed facial characteristics and fingers, giving it an abstract and modernist aesthetic. The arms are bent at the elbows, with one arm swinging forward and the other back, emphasizing the sense of motion. The entire figure is mounted on a rectangular base, which provides stability and a sense of grounding. The surface of the sculpture appears rough and matte, with visible texture that suggests it is cast from a material like bronze or concrete. The coloration is a uniform gray, further enhancing the minimalist and contemporary feel of the piece.
description: A stylized, abstract human figure in a running pose, mounted on a rectangular base with a rough, gray surface. The sculpture emphasizes motion and has simplified anatomical features.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the front-left, highlighting the forward stride and the bent rear leg, with the left arm swinging back and the right arm forward.
description_view_1: This right-side view emphasizes the extended front leg and the profile of the torso, showing the dynamic posture and the angular bend of the arms.
description_view_2: From the rear-left, the back and shoulders are prominent, and the bent rear leg is clearly visible, with the head turned slightly to the left.
description_view_3: The right-rear view shows the length of the stride, the muscular definition of the legs, and the forward thrust of the chest and head.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an outdoor urban plaza, park, or public walkway.
